CollectionName.description: Logical MongoDB collection name constrained by the tenant naming policy.
CollectionName.name: collectionName

DatabaseName.description: Stable PostgreSQL database identifier managed through the BaaS contract.
DatabaseName.name: databaseName

DocumentId.description: Logical MongoDB document identifier resolved inside the tenant-scoped collection route.
DocumentId.name: documentId

IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

MongoDataFilter.description: JSON-encoded MongoDB filter constrained to the public Data API allowlist.
MongoDataFilter.name: filter

MongoDataProjection.description: JSON-encoded MongoDB projection document constrained to include/exclude semantics.
MongoDataProjection.name: projection

MongoDataSort.description: JSON-encoded MongoDB sort document using asc/desc or 1/-1 directions.
MongoDataSort.name: sort

MongoIndexName.description: Normalized MongoDB index name constrained by the tenant naming policy.
MongoIndexName.name: indexName

MongoUserName.description: Workspace-scoped MongoDB username constrained by the tenant naming policy.
MongoUserName.name: mongoUserName

MongoViewName.description: Normalized MongoDB view name constrained by the tenant naming policy.
MongoViewName.name: viewName

PageAfter.description: Opaque cursor for the next page window.
PageAfter.name: page[after]

PageSize.description: Maximum number of items to return for list and catalog routes.
PageSize.name: page[size]

RoleBindingId.description: Stable identifier for one normalized MongoDB role binding.
RoleBindingId.name: roleBindingId

Search.description: Free-text search across human-facing route metadata.
Search.name: search

Sort.description: Stable sort field for catalog and collection routes.
Sort.name: sort

XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.
XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version

XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.
XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id

XOriginSurface.description: Optional caller-declared origin surface persisted into audit and trace metadata when supplied.
XOriginSurface.name: X-Origin-Surface

MongoDataUpdateDocument.description: MongoDB update document constrained to the public Data API operator allowlist.

info.description: Workspace-scoped document database control, discovery, and tenant-safe Data API routes exposed through the public gateway. Includes document CRUD, validated query controls, bounded bulk write, and collection-validation-aware mutation semantics. Generated from the unified public API contract for v1.
info.summary: Workspace-scoped document database control, discovery, and tenant-safe Data API routes exposed through the public gateway. Includes document CRUD, validated query controls, bounded bulk write, and collection-validation-aware mutation semantics.
info.title: In Atelier Mongo API
